note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

plaintiff.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

superior_court.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

district_court.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

county.guidance: A Maine county name without the word 'County' (e.g. Cumberland).

location_town.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

defendant.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

defendant_requests_a_renewal_writ_of_exe.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

in_the_amount_of.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.

in_debt_or_damage_and.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.

was_lostdestroyed_affidavit_attached_pur.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

is_attached_to_this_request.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

mailed_to_judgment_debtor_at_the_followi.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.
